decision_rationale: Family resolver kept S3.5 strategy 's3_enforce_ssl_strict_deny' executable because Terraform can merge the current bucket policy at apply time. Runtime capture failed (NoSuchBucket), so the customer-run Terraform bundle must fetch the live policy. Run creation did not require additional risk-only acceptance.

title: S3 general purpose buckets should require requests to use SSL
